steps.title: Compare the two claims
steps.content: Text 2 argues that financial security affects who becomes a poet because extensive practice requires time that full-time workers often lack. Lorde's view in Text 1 challenges that barrier.

steps.title: Use Lorde's counterpoint
steps.content: Lorde says poets can write between shifts, in pantries, on subways, and on scraps of paper. A, B, and D add claims about other art forms, publication income, or training costs that Lorde does not make. The answer is C.
